rows.label: tlk45450112_01_msg0001
rows.name:
A hundred thousand G...
That is a lot of money.

rows.label: tlk45450112_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Yeah, I've never been paid
anything like this much before.

rows.label: tlk45450112_01_msg0003
rows.name:
And another hundred thousand
if you succeed? I am jealous.
Share a little with me...

rows.label: tlk45450112_01_msg0005
rows.name:
Haha, I'm not trying to guilt
you or anything. You just do
your best out there, all right?
